    CAGEMATCH Â» Events Database Â» WWE Monday Night RAW #1440

    WWE Monday Night RAW #1440

    TV-Show

    • Results
    • Card
    • Card with guide
    • Champions
    • Additional events
    • Ratings
    • Comments
    Name of the event:
    WWE Monday Night RAW #1440
    Date:
    28.12.2020
    Promotion:
    World Wrestling Entertainment
    Type:
    TV-Show
    Location:
    St. Petersburg, Florida, USA
    Arena:
    WWE ThunderDome (Tropicana Field)
    Broadcast type:
    Live
    Broadcast date:
    28.12.2020
    TV station/network:
    USA Network
    Commentary by:
    Byron Saxton, Drew McIntyre, Samoa Joe & Tom Phillips
    :::: Matchguide Rating: 6.45 based on 21 votes. ::::
    WWE Title #1 Contendership Match
    Keith Lee defeats Sheamus (12:55)
    :::: Not eligible for the matchguide: match length < 5 minutes. ::::
    Singles Match
    Gran Metalik (w/Lince Dorado) defeats The Miz (w/John Morrison) (3:20)
    :::: Not eligible for the matchguide: match length < 5 minutes. ::::
    Singles Match
    Shayna Baszler defeats Dana Brooke (w/Mandy Rose) (4:20)
    :::: Matchguide Rating: 6.40 based on 24 votes. ::::
    Singles Match
    AJ Styles (w/Omos) defeats Elias (w/Jaxson Ryker) (14:00)
    :::: Matchguide Rating: 6.56 based on 15 votes. ::::
    Singles Match
    Mustafa Ali (w/Mace, Reckoning, Slapjack & T-BAR) defeats Ricochet (11:50)
    :::: Matchguide Rating: 2.56 based on 26 votes. ::::
    Singles Match
    Charlotte Flair (w/Asuka) defeats Nia Jax (w/Shayna Baszler) by DQ (10:50)
    :::: Matchguide Rating: 6.12 based on 16 votes. ::::
    Eight Man Tag Team Match
    The Hurt Business (Bobby Lashley, Cedric Alexander, MVP & Shelton Benjamin) defeat Jeff Hardy, Riddle & The New Day (Kofi Kingston & Xavier Woods) (13:45)
    All workers
    AJ Styles, Asuka, Bobby Lashley, Cedric Alexander, Charlotte Flair, Dana Brooke, Elias, Gran Metalik, Jaxson Ryker, Jeff Hardy, John Morrison, Keith Lee, Kofi Kingston, Lince Dorado, Mace, Mandy Rose, Mustafa Ali, MVP, Nia Jax, Omos, Reckoning, Ricochet, Riddle, Shayna Baszler, Sheamus, Shelton Benjamin, Slapjack, T-BAR, The Hurt Business, The Miz, The New Day, Xavier Woods
    6.73

    • Read latest comments

    Other:
    • Details & History

    • Help and formula
    Latest comments of the CAGEMATCH inmates
    MaskDeMasque wrote on 25.07.2021:
    [6.0] "Middle of the road show. Opener, Ali-Ricochet and Main Event were good, but there also was a lot of filler as usual."
    BUIOOMEGA wrote on 30.12.2020:
    [7.0] "Very good episode of Raw with great things between Orton and Alexa and all good matches, really nice to say that in a weekly like Raw. Kudos for WWE to honoring the memory of Luke Harper/Brodie Lee as well as the reference of Tom Phillips, Drew McIntyre, Xavier Woods and the others. R. I. P. Brodie Lee."
    Blingice wrote on 30.12.2020:
    [8.0] "Lots of matches, of a good length. No shit talks, nothing cringe, nothing really bad. Only bad point is the boring stuff with The Miz. A final segment that puts butts off seats. Nothing revolutionary, but good and what we want to see everytime."
    Sagasta wrote on 29.12.2020:
    [7.0] "The best Raw in many time. Se have good matches like Lee vs Sheamus, Styles vs ElÃ­as por Ricochet vs Ali. Also good promos like the amaizing feud between Randy, Wyatt and Alexa. The worst was the womens division, more focus on the tag titles that in the main title."
    Joe King wrote on 29.12.2020:
    [7.0] "Good show, lots of good action ! The building towards the Royal Rumble starts well Top 3 of the Night 3. Keith Lee 2. The Miz 1. Alexa Bliss"
    Okaro143 wrote on 29.12.2020:
    [7.0] "Pretty good show. It was an unexpectedly a good show with a lot of action and some good storyline progression. The only thing I didn't like would be the women's matches."
